clusters.leadHeadline: NWSL Adds 18th Team in Columbus; Haslams Pay $205M
clusters.summary: Haslam Sports Group becomes latest expansion owner in major league sports, signaling continued growth in women's soccer. NWSL targets 2028 launch with highest-profile ownership group yet.

clusters.leadHeadline: Illinois Lawmakers Race to Advance $5B Bears Stadium Plan
clusters.summary: State legislature accelerates approval process for one of sports' largest stadium deals amid relocation pressure. Decision timeline tightens as franchise threatens move to Indiana.

clusters.leadHeadline: NIL 'Associated Entities' Dispute Could Eliminate College Salary Cap
clusters.summary: Ongoing legal battle over NIL definitions threatens to dismantle any remaining salary cap structure in college sports. Dispute centers on how schools can legally compensate athletes through third parties.

clusters.leadHeadline: NFL Rookie Deals Top $50M for First Time Since 2010
clusters.summary: Top draft pick this year will earn nearly $55 million, reflecting massive salary inflation in rookie contracts. Represents significant shift in NFL compensation structure since last decade.

clusters.leadHeadline: Real Madrid, Barcelona Lead Soccer Valuations at $14B Combined
clusters.summary: European soccer's elite command staggering valuations despite financial system showing cracks with significant losses. Latest accounts reveal disconnect between franchise values and club profitability.

clusters.leadHeadline: Churchill Downs Acquires Preakness Stakes IP Rights for $85M
clusters.summary: Derby owner consolidates Triple Crown control by acquiring second leg's intellectual property rights. Move centralizes prestigious racing franchise portfolio under single operator.

clusters.leadHeadline: Athlete-Owned Media Gaining Traction; Brandon Marshall Leads Charge
clusters.summary: Former NFL star bets on I AM ATHLETE platform as athletes bypass traditional media gatekeepers. Signals shift in sports content control and monetization power.

clusters.leadHeadline: TickPick Acquires Momento App for Live Event Memory Catalog
clusters.summary: Ticket marketplace expands into fan experience monetization by acquiring memory-archiving platform. New vertical targets post-purchase engagement and secondary revenue streams.

poll.question: Will the $5B Illinois Bears stadium deal close before relocation deadline?
options: Yes, legislators will push it through
Team stays in Chicago but smaller deal

predictions.statement: NWSL reaches 20 teams by 2030 with expansion fees averaging $250M+
predictions.rationale: Columbus entry at $205M and Haslam backing signals strong demand; women's soccer valuations climbing fast

predictions.statement: College sports loses federal funding restrictions after Trump executive order enforcement attempts
predictions.rationale: Legal challenges likely but threat alone will pressure NCAA and schools to reform governance before enforcement

predictions.statement: NFL rookie salary cap exceptions phase in after top pick deal hits $60M by 2028
predictions.rationale: $50M+ rookie deals unsustainable within current cap; owners will demand reform at next CBA negotiation

predictions.statement: European soccer institutes mandatory financial regulations after Real Madrid/Barca loss reports surface
predictions.rationale: Current system showing cracks but UEFA historically weak on enforcement; political resistance from elite clubs remains high

predictions.statement: NIL 'associated entities' ruling eliminates school salary cap control by end of 2026
predictions.rationale: Court already trending toward athlete compensation freedom; current litigation specifically targets cap mechanisms
